debug_info.goal:
v : HeightOneSpectrum (RingOfIntegers ℚ)
⊢ Set.BijOn ⇑(IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.padicEquiv v) ↑(adicCompletionIntegers ℚ v)
    ↑(subring (IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.natGenerator v))

failed_attempts:
rw [Set.BijOn]
  constructor
  · -- Show injective
    intro a ha b hb h
    exact_mod_cast h
  constructor
  · -- Show surjective
    intro b hb
    use (IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.padicEquiv v).choose b
    constructor
    · -- Show that the chosen element is in the domain
      have h1 : (IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.padicEquiv v).choose b ∈ v.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ := by
        have h2 : (IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.padicEquiv v).choose b ∈ (v : HeightOneSpectrum (RingOfIntegers ℚ)).adicCompletionIntegers ℚ := by
          apply (IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.padicEquiv v).choose_mem
          all_goals
            simpa using hb
        exact_mod_cast h2
      exact_mod_cast h1
    · -- Show that applying the map gives b
      exact_mod_cast (IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.padicEquiv v).choose_spec b)

unfold Set.BijOn
  constructor
  · -- injective
    intro x hx y hy h
    simp at h
    exact h
  constructor
  · -- surjective
    intro z hz
    use z
    simp at hz ⊢
    all_goals try tauto
  · -- maps to subring
    intro x hx
    simp at hx ⊢
    all_goals try tauto
exact ⟨by simp, by simp, by simp⟩

rw [Set.BijOn]
  constructor
  · -- Show injective
    intro x hx y hy h
    have h1 : (IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.padicEquiv v) x = (IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.padicEquiv v) y := by
      simpa using h
    have h2 : x = y := by
      have h_inj : Injective (IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.padicEquiv v) := by
        apply IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.padicEquiv_injective
      exact h_inj h1
    exact h2
  · -- Show surjective
    intro q hq
    have h3 : q ∈ (subring (IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.natGenerator v) : Set ℚ) := by
      simpa using hq
    have h4 : q ∈ (v.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ : Set ℚ) := by
      have h5 : (subring (IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.natGenerator v) : Set ℚ) = (v.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ : Set ℚ) := by
        ext q
        simp [subring, IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.natGenerator]
        <;> try { tauto }
      rw [h5] at h3
      exact h3
    use q
    simp [h4]
    <;> try { tauto }
